summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: phase-circle proof of clacks = π·10^k. BLUE wall edge + RED √Mv=√mu edge at angle θ = arctan(1/√(M/m)) for M/m=100 → θ≈5.71°. ValueTracker step_tr draws YELLOW chords connecting successive reflection points at angles k·θ via always_redraw; each chord = one collision. Live count → 31 reflections.
